steps.title: Keep verb and object together
steps.content: The sentence needs the verb phrase "will appreciate" followed directly by its object, "the multiple references." No punctuation should interrupt a verb and the object it takes.

steps.title: Reject broken punctuation
steps.content: B uses a period that incorrectly starts a fragment. C inserts a comma between the verb and its object. D inserts a colon where no list or explanation is being introduced. The answer is A.
